untranslatable_reason: The signal requires detection of specific candlestick pattern morphology (two visibly different peaks: wide/rounded left peak vs. narrow/spike-shaped right peak, plus neckline identification and volume dome shape analysis). These geometric and volume pattern characteristics cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume Ratio, Returns, Bar Properties). A full double-top pattern detector would require custom pattern recognition logic beyond the scope of allowed indicators and operators.
translation_notes: Approximated entry conditions using price breakdown below pivot (neckline proxy) and trend reversal signal (SMA crossover). The core pattern recognition requirement (morphological differences between two peaks, dome-shaped volume confirmation, valley/neckline measurement) cannot be accurately translated to the allowed indicator set. This rule should be implemented with a dedicated pattern recognition module or by enriching the allowed indicators to include pattern-specific metrics like 'peak_prominence', 'peak_width_ratio', 'volume_shape_metric'.
